phase: Phase 3 — SFT/QLoRA training (1-step smoke, safe variant)
reason: 1 optimizer step succeeded (loss=0.3726, ~29.5s/step) with eval disabled and Trainer-level saves disabled. Output dir is empty — no checkpoint, no trainer_state, no tokenizer, no metrics. The previous smoke OOM is fully mitigated by the new safety wiring.

train_step_proof.loss_match_with_previous_smoke: 0.3726 == 0.3726 (bit-exact reproducibility on the same hardware/seed, confirms the safety fix did not perturb training)

no_save_to_trainer_save_strategy.rationale: build_sft_kwargs() forces save_strategy='no' when no_save=True so Trainer never drops a checkpoint mid-training (HF treats max_steps as an epoch boundary, so save_strategy='epoch' would fire after max_steps=1).

eval_strategy_no.rationale: should_load_eval_dataset() returns False when eval_strategy='no'; eval JSONL is not loaded and SFTTrainer is constructed without eval_dataset. The post-step eval at the max_steps=1 boundary (which OOMed in the previous smoke) cannot fire.

safety_wiring_proof.post_training_save_block: cfg['no_save']=True path skips trainer.save_model(), trainer.save_state(), training_metrics.json write, and tokenizer.save_pretrained().

data_provenance.user_message_duplicate_check: passed — chat_formatted user content already embeds fecha+título+texto_original; script does not concatenate again

history.summary: 1 optimizer step succeeded (loss=0.3726); post-step eval OOMed at eval batch 3/5 on the first MLP forward (gate_proj LoRA).
history.root_cause: Two safety gaps: (a) eval_strategy='epoch' triggered eval at the max_steps=1 boundary, (b) per_device_eval_batch_size defaulted to Transformers' 8, so the 35 eval rows became 5 in-flight batches instead of 35, and (c) --no-save only skipped the post-training trainer.save_model() — Trainer would still drop a checkpoint at the epoch boundary because save_strategy stayed at 'epoch'.

history.summary: 1 optimizer step succeeded (loss=0.3726, ~29.5s/step) with eval disabled and Trainer-level saves disabled. Output dir empty. GPU clean.
fixes_applied: training/config_qwen_protesta_v1.json: added per_device_eval_batch_size=1 to the training block.
training/train_sft.py: TrainingConfig.per_device_eval_batch_size default = 1; config_from_file reads it; --per-device-eval-batch-size CLI flag added; merged into scalar_keys.
training/train_sft.py: --eval-strategy now argparse-choices-constrained to ['no', 'steps', 'epoch']; help text documents 'no' for smoke.
training/train_sft.py: extracted build_sft_kwargs() helper; forces save_strategy='no' when no_save=True so Trainer cannot drop a checkpoint mid-training.
training/train_sft.py: extracted should_load_eval_dataset() helper; run_training() skips loading the eval JSONL and skips passing eval_dataset to SFTTrainer when eval_strategy='no'.
scripts/test_train_sft_config.py: new TestSftKwargSafety class (7 tests) covers the three regressions above plus CLI choices.

observations: 1 optimizer step succeeded (loss=0.3726) — bit-exact reproducibility vs. the v1 smoke confirms the safety fix did not perturb the training forward/backward.
Post-step eval did NOT fire because eval_strategy='no' was passed through both argparse (choices=['no','steps','epoch']) and build_sft_kwargs (eval_strategy='no' in SFTConfig).

should_load_eval_dataset() returned False, so load_chat_formatted_dataset() was never called for the eval JSONL and SFTTrainer was constructed without eval_dataset — the path that OOMed in v1 is unreachable.
build_sft_kwargs() forced save_strategy='no' when no_save=True, so Trainer did not attempt to write checkpoint-N at the max_steps=1 boundary (HF treats max_steps as an epoch boundary).
cfg['no_save']=True path skipped trainer.save_model(), trainer.save_state(), training_metrics.json, and tokenizer.save_pretrained() after train().
Output dir is empty (just the auto-created directory entry, 4096 bytes). No checkpoint/adapters/trainer_state files were written anywhere.
GPU memory fully released back to 31.4 GiB free after run completion.
next_step_blocked_options: Separate eval smoke: load the saved adapter and run a per_device_eval_batch_size=1 eval pass against data/chat_formatted/eval.jsonl to confirm the 35-row eval set fits in the 32 GiB RTX 5090 (and check eval_loss).
Full training (3 epochs) with eval_strategy='no' + per_device_eval_batch_size=1 (in case a future epoch end needs eval).
If a future training run wants in-training eval, set eval_strategy='steps' with eval_steps=N and rely on the per_device_eval_batch_size=1 default to avoid the v1 OOM.
methodology_preserved: GPT-5.4-mini + validación humana Nico is the dataset origin; no gpt-5.5 baseline/origin claim added.
All 350 rows remain weight 1.0; no gold/silver split introduced.
User message not duplicated: chat_formatted user content already embeds fecha+título+texto_original; this script does not re-concatenate.
max_seq_length kept at 20480 (Phase 3 readiness budget, overall_max=18916).
